channel.title: Visual Studio 2026 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Visual Studio 2026 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: A step-by-step guide to modernizing .NET applications with GitHub Copilot agent mode
item.description:
This .NET Blog post shows a step-by-step workflow using Visual Studio 2026 and GitHub Copilot agent mode to modernize .NET applications by upgrading .NET versions and frameworks, resolving build issues, and migrating apps to Azure with reduced manual effort.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) 22
item.description:
SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) 22 is now generally available. Built on Visual Studio 2026, SSMS 22 adds support for SQL Server 2025 and offers improved integration for managing and troubleshooting SQL databases and writing T-SQL.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Get Ready for .NET Conf 2025!
item.description:
Announcement: .NET Conf 2025 is scheduled for November 11–13, featuring .NET 10 and Visual Studio 2026, with a Student Zone on November 14.

  • Source: .NET
